steps.slash: /sendas name="Arin" We arrive at the hall and talk quietly.

steps.eval: await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.applyExtractionAudit({ id:'a1', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), priority:0, reason:'manual', contractHash:'h', scope:[], window:{from:0,to:1}, prompt:'p', rawResponse:'r', acceptedDeltas:[], rejected:[] }, [], [ { tier:'facts', type:'fact', importance:2, expiration:'permanent', entities:[], characterId:'arin', text:'Arin distrusts the vault door.', evidence:'quote' }, { tier:'session_details', type:'scene', importance:1, expiration:'scene', entities:[], text:'Candlelit hall, hushed voices.', evidence:'quote' } ]); return globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot().memory.entries.length;

steps.eval: const chat = SillyTavern.getContext().chat; const last = chat[chat.length - 1]; if (!last || !last.mes.includes('The scene shifts.')) throw new Error('expected sceneBreak scripted reply, last=' + JSON.stringify(last)); return last;

globalThis.storyOrchestratorDebugSceneSummaryResponse = 'They pressed deeper as the vault split into a second chamber.'; await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.runSceneBreakPass({ id:'a3', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), priority:0, reason:'scene:divider', contractHash:'h', scope:[], window:{from:2,to:3}, prompt:'p', rawResponse:'r', acceptedDeltas:[], rejected:[], sceneBreak:{at:3, reason:'divider'} }); return globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot().memory.sceneCount;

const chat = SillyTavern.getContext().chat; const n = chat.filter((m) => typeof m.mes === 'string' && m.mes.includes('The scene shifts.')).length; if (n < 2) throw new Error('expected the sceneBreak reply to fire on each distinct break, got ' + n); return n;

const s = globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot(); const p = SillyTavern.getContext().extensionPrompts['story_orchestrator_memory_facts']; if (p && p.value && p.value.includes('Arin distrusts the vault door.')) throw new Error('expected Arin fact to stop injecting after cast disable, prompt=' + JSON.stringify(p)); return { ids: globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getEnabledCharacterIds() };
